sections.heading: Acme Shop About
sections.content:
Acme Shop is an e-commerce platform founded in 2005 by Jane Doe and John Smith, originating from a garage in San Francisco. Initially focusing on unique handcrafted items, the company has since expanded its product offerings to include electronics, home goods, and apparel, establishing itself as a significant player in the online shopping space. Acme Shop is recognized for its commitment to customer satisfaction, integrity, innovation, and sustainability, including eco-friendly packaging initiatives. The company operates warehouses in key locations worldwide, including the U.S., Netherlands, and Singapore, facilitating quick shipping. With a leadership team that emphasizes operational efficiency and technology, Acme Shop aims to provide an exceptional shopping journey for all customers.

[Source: fake-docs/acme_shop_about.md]

sections.heading: 關於Acme商店
sections.content:
ACME商店是一個虛構的線上購物平台，由林雅文與陳建宏於2005年共同創辦，最初專注於手作雜貨，後來擴展到3C電子、居家生活及服飾配件等類別。其經營理念以「顧客至上、誠信經營、持續創新」為核心，注重商品品質及透明的退換貨規則，同時重視永續發展。ACME商店服務台灣本島及離島地區，並提供24小時的線上購物服務，實體門市設於台北，供顧客現場體驗商品。

[Source: 關於ACME商店.md]

sections.heading: Accepted Cards
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, customers can conveniently use major credit cards such as Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for their purchases. The checkout process is straightforward, requiring essential card details, and transactions are processed securely by a payment processor. While Acme Shop does not impose extra fees for card use, customers should be aware of potential fees from their card issuers, such as foreign transaction fees, and ensure their billing address matches the one associated with their card to prevent any issues during payment.

[Source: payment_methods.md#accepted-cards]

sections.heading: Applying a Code
sections.content:
Applying a promotional code at Acme Shop is easy. After adding items to your cart, go to the checkout page and enter your code in the "Promo Code" field. Ensure that the code is entered correctly, then click "Apply" to reflect any discounts in your order total. Be aware that promo codes may have specific conditions, such as minimum purchase amounts and expiration dates, so check those details beforehand. If you encounter any issues, such as error messages or unrecognized codes, contact customer support for assistance. Note that promo codes cannot be combined with other offers, and do not apply to shipping fees or taxes.

[Source: promo_codes.md#applying-a-code]

sections.heading: Backordered Items
sections.content:
In the context of order management at Acme Shop, backordered items are those that are temporarily out of stock but will be restocked soon. Customers are notified via email immediately after placing an order if any items are backordered, with an estimated restock date provided. There are no additional fees for backordered items, and customers can choose to wait for restocking or cancel the item for a full refund. In-stock items will be shipped right away to prevent delays, and if a backordered item hasn't shipped within 30 days of the estimated date, compensation or discounts may be available.

[Source: order_management.md#backordered-items]

sections.heading: Buy Online Pick Up In Store
heading_path: Buy Online Pick Up In Store
sections.content:
To use the in-store pickup service at Acme Shop, customers must first add items to their cart from the online catalog and select the "Buy Online Pick Up In Store" option during checkout. They will choose a preferred store location based on their ZIP code and receive an email confirmation with order details and an estimated pickup time, typically within 2 hours for in-stock items. Certain items may be ineligible for this service, clearly marked on the product page, and pickup requires the confirmation email and a valid photo ID. Orders need to be picked up within 7 days to avoid cancellation.

[Source: store_pickup.md#buy-online-pick-up-in-store]

sections.heading: Cancellation Window
sections.content:
The cancellation window for orders allows customers to cancel their purchases within 24 hours, provided the order has not yet shipped. Once an order is shipped, customers are required to initiate a return instead of canceling the order.

[Source: refund_policy.md#cancellation-window]

sections.heading: Change Email Address
sections.content:
Customers can update their email address through the Account Settings section. After entering the new email, it must be verified for it to be activated and utilized.

[Source: account_help.md#change-email-address]

sections.heading: Change Shipping Address
sections.content:
To change your shipping address for an order at Acme Shop, log in to your account, go to the "Order Management" section, and select the order you want to modify. If the order is still "Processing," click on "Edit Shipping Address" to enter the new address, and make sure to save the changes. Note that address changes can only be made before the order is marked as "Shipped," and if it has already shipped, you will need to contact the carrier directly. There are no fees for changing the shipping address prior to shipment, but it's essential to ensure the accuracy of the new address to avoid delivery issues.

[Source: order_management.md#change-shipping-address]

sections.heading: Cleaning Instructions
sections.content:
To maintain the longevity and appearance of products from Acme Shop, proper cleaning is essential. Fabric items should be hand washed with gentle detergent and air dried to avoid damage, while electronic items require unplugging before cleaning with a microfiber cloth, using distilled water or electronic-safe solutions for deeper cleaning. Wooden and metal items can be cleaned with a soft cloth, and care should be taken to dry metal thoroughly to prevent rust. Acme Shop provides free guidance on product care through their customer service team.

[Source: product_care.md#cleaning-instructions]

sections.heading: Combine Orders
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, customers can combine two separate orders into a single shipment if the orders are placed within a 12-hour window and have not yet been processed for shipping. To initiate this, customers must log into their account, go to "Order History," and submit a combination request, which will be reviewed within 1-2 business days. While there are no additional fees for combining orders, standard shipping rates will apply to the combined package. However, in cases where orders include perishable items or items on backorder, combining may not be possible.

[Source: order_management.md#combine-orders]

sections.heading: Contact Channels
sections.content:
Acme Shop offers multiple contact channels for customer support to cater to different preferences. For immediate assistance, a 24/7 live chat is available on their website, where customers can quickly resolve issues like order tracking and returns. For less urgent matters, customers can email support@acmeshop.com, with a response time of up to 24 hours. Additionally, a customer support hotline is accessible Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM for those who prefer to speak with a representative directly, though standard carrier rates may apply.

[Source: customer_support.md#contact-channels]

sections.heading: Coverage Period
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, the standard warranty covers products for 12 months from the date of purchase, protecting against defects in materials and workmanship during normal use. To claim warranty service, customers must provide a receipt and describe the issue with the product. The warranty does not cover misuse, alterations, accidental damage, or wear and tear, and consumable parts like batteries are excluded unless defective. Acme Shop aims to process claims quickly, typically resolving them within 14 business days, while providing guidance throughout the process.

[Source: warranty.md#coverage-period]

sections.heading: Customs and Duties
sections.content:
When ordering internationally from Acme Shop, customers should be informed of potential import duties and taxes, commonly known as customs fees, which are determined by the destination country based on item value and type. Acme Shop does not control these fees; hence, customers must settle any duties and taxes upon receipt. Customs processing times may extend delivery estimates, and while some countries offer pre-paid options for these fees, it is not universally available. If a package is held or returned due to non-payment of duties, Acme Shop will reach out to discuss further options.

[Source: international_shipping.md#customs-and-duties]

sections.heading: Delete Account
sections.content:
Customers looking to delete their accounts can initiate this process through the Privacy Settings. The deletion requests are typically processed and completed within a timeframe of 14 days.

[Source: account_help.md#delete-account]

sections.heading: Earning Points
sections.content:
The Acme Rewards program at Acme Shop allows customers to earn 1 point for every dollar spent on eligible purchases, excluding gift cards, taxes, and shipping fees. Points are automatically credited to the customer's account within 24 hours of purchase. Additionally, customers can participate in promotional events for bonus points, such as double-point days, and earn 50 bonus points for each friend referred who makes their first purchase. Points are valid for 12 months and cannot be redeemed for cash; returning purchases will result in point deductions.

[Source: loyalty_program.md#earning-points]

sections.heading: Eligibility and Minimum Order
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, bulk orders are available to registered businesses, non-profit organizations, educational institutions, and government agencies, while individuals and unregistered entities are not eligible. To qualify, customers may need to provide documentation such as a business license or tax-exempt certificate. The minimum order quantity is usually 100 units per product, though this can vary based on product type or seasonal promotions. Interested customers should contact the bulk order team for assistance with the ordering process, potential discounts, and estimated delivery times, which typically range from 7 to 14 business days, potentially incurring additional shipping fees.

[Source: bulk_orders.md#eligibility-and-minimum-order]

sections.heading: Escalation Process
sections.content:
The escalation process at Acme Shop is designed to enhance customer support for unresolved issues. If a customer's problem persists after two attempts with the standard support team, they can request an escalation to a specialized team capable of addressing complex concerns, such as technical issues and billing discrepancies. To start this process, the customer must inform their support agent, who will submit the request and ensure acknowledgment within 24 hours. The specialist team is committed to responding to escalated issues within 3 to 5 business days, with certain cases prioritized due to safety or legal implications.

[Source: customer_support.md#escalation-process]

sections.heading: Expedited Shipping
sections.content:
Expedited shipping offers a delivery timeframe of 1-2 business days. It is important to note that any fees associated with expedited shipping are non-refundable once the package has been shipped.

[Source: shipping_faq.md#expedited-shipping]

sections.heading: Failed Payments
sections.content:
When a payment is declined at Acme Shop, it usually indicates that the bank or payment provider has rejected the transaction due to reasons such as insufficient funds, incorrect card details, expired cards, or security concerns. Customers receive immediate notifications to review their payment information and should check card details, billing addresses, and card validity. If issues persist, contacting the bank or card issuer is recommended, and alternative payment methods like [[PayPal]] may be used if necessary.

[Source: payment_methods.md#failed-payments]

sections.heading: Fulfilment and Lead Times
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, the fulfilment process for bulk orders is designed to ensure timely and transparent delivery. After placing a bulk order, processing typically takes 2–3 business days, followed by shipping times of 5–7 business days for domestic orders and 10–15 business days for international ones. Customers receive a tracking number once their order is shipped, although lead times may vary due to factors like peak seasons or customs delays. A minimum purchase requirement may apply, and shipping fees are based on the shipment’s weight, dimensions, and delivery location.

[Source: bulk_orders.md#fulfilment-and-lead-times]

sections.heading: International Delivery Times
sections.content:
The international delivery times at Acme Shop vary based on destination and shipping method, with standard shipments generally taking 7 to 21 business days, while express options range from 3 to 10 business days. These estimates exclude weekends, holidays, and potential customs delays, and processing times of 1 to 3 business days should also be considered. Additional customs duties and taxes may apply upon the package's arrival, and these are the recipient's responsibility. Customers are encouraged to order early during peak seasons to avoid extended delivery times.

[Source: international_shipping.md#international-delivery-times]

sections.heading: Lost Gift Cards
sections.content:
If you lose your Acme Shop gift card, replacement is possible under certain conditions. You must provide proof of purchase, such as a receipt or confirmation email, and the original payment method. Registering your gift card on the website simplifies the process, allowing easier verification of details. To request a replacement, contact customer support, which may take up to 10 business days to process. A $5 processing fee may apply, and additional verification may be required in specific cases, such as promotional gift cards or cards with partial usage.

[Source: gift_cards.md#lost-gift-cards]

sections.heading: Managing a Subscription
sections.content:
To manage a subscription with Acme Shop, users can pause, skip, or cancel their subscription. Pausing is done through the "My Subscriptions" section, allowing a pause of up to three months, with a requirement to pause at least 24 hours before the next billing. Users can also skip a delivery with a similar process, needing to do so at least 48 hours prior to the scheduled delivery. To cancel, users must confirm the cancellation in the same section and provide a reason, ensuring it is done at least 24 hours before the next billing to avoid charges. Cancellations do not affect remaining pre-paid deliveries unless a refund request is made.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#managing-a-subscription]

sections.heading: Managing Trusted Devices
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, managing trusted devices is essential for maintaining account security. Users can access and manage their trusted devices by logging into their account, navigating to "Account Settings", and selecting "Security Settings" followed by "Trusted Devices". This interface displays all trusted devices, which can be removed with a simple click, prompting additional security steps for future logins from those devices. In cases of suspected unauthorized access, users are advised to change their password and remove all trusted devices immediately for enhanced security.

[Source: account_security.md#managing-trusted-devices]

sections.heading: Membership Tiers
sections.content:
Acme Shop's Loyalty Program features three membership tiers: Silver, Gold, and Platinum, designed to offer increasing benefits based on annual spending. Members begin at the Silver tier after spending a minimum of $500, which includes a 5% discount and early access to sales. To reach the Gold tier, members must spend $2,000, gaining a 10% discount, free shipping, and priority customer service. The Platinum tier requires a $5,000 annual spend, providing a 15% discount, express shipping, VIP event access, and a personal shopping assistant. Membership levels are reassessed annually based on spending.

[Source: loyalty_program.md#membership-tiers]

sections.heading: Non-Refundable Items
sections.content:
The refund policy specifies that certain items are non-refundable, including digital gift cards, final sale items, and personalized products. Refunds for these items are only permitted if mandated by local law.

[Source: refund_policy.md#non-refundable-items]

sections.heading: Payment Authorization
sections.content:
The payment authorization process at Acme Shop is key to ensuring smooth transactions. When an order is placed, Acme Shop verifies payment details with the bank, temporarily reserving the funds for 3 to 7 business days. Once the order is ready for shipment, the funds are captured, completing the transaction. In cases of cancellations or issues, the hold on funds is released according to the bank's policies, and no additional fees are charged by Acme Shop, although users should check with their banks for any potential fees.

[Source: payment_methods.md#payment-authorization]

sections.heading: Pickup Identification
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, customers must present valid government-issued photo identification, such as a driver's license, passport, or state ID, to collect their orders. If someone else is picking up an order, they must be designated as an authorized person and present their ID along with the order confirmation. Orders are typically ready for pickup within 24 hours, and customers receive an email notification for collection. It is important to pick up the order within seven days of the notification to ensure receipt, with no additional fees for this service.

[Source: store_pickup.md#pickup-identification]

sections.heading: Price Match Eligibility
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, the Price Match Guarantee aims to provide customers with competitive pricing on products. To qualify, items must be identical to those offered by competitors, including brand, model number, and color, and must be available for immediate purchase. Customers can request a price match within 14 days of their purchase by providing proof of a competitor's lower price, although certain promotions and membership-based pricing are excluded from eligibility.

[Source: price_matching.md#price-match-eligibility]

sections.heading: Product Reviews
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, customer feedback is crucial, and the company aims to provide trustworthy product reviews to aid in purchasing decisions. After a purchase is confirmed and delivered, customers will receive an email invitation to leave a review within 7 to 14 days. Only verified buyers can submit reviews, which are then moderated within 24 to 48 hours to ensure they meet content guidelines, ensuring a fair and authentic review system. Reviews are displayed on product pages and contribute to overall star ratings, while customer support is available for assistance with any review-related issues.

[Source: product_information.md#product-reviews]

sections.heading: Purchase and Delivery
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, customers can easily purchase both digital and physical gift cards. Digital gift cards are available through the Gift Cards page, and are delivered via email within an hour of purchase, although it may take up to 24 hours during peak times. Physical gift cards, also purchased from the same page, are shipped to the recipient's postal address and typically arrive within 5-7 business days, with expedited options available for a fee. Gift cards can be redeemed both online and in-store, providing recipients with flexible shopping choices.

[Source: gift_cards.md#purchase-and-delivery]

sections.heading: Redeeming a Gift Card
sections.content:
To redeem a gift card at Acme Shop, add your desired items to the shopping cart and proceed to checkout. In the "Gift Card or Discount Code" field, enter your gift card code and click "Apply" to deduct the balance from your total. If your gift card balance is greater than the order total, the remaining balance will be saved; if it’s less, you must pay the difference. Ensure your card is valid and hasn’t expired, as certain items may also be ineligible for purchase. For issues redeeming the card, check for errors or contact customer support for help.

[Source: gift_cards.md#redeeming-a-gift-card]

sections.heading: Redeeming Points
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, redeeming loyalty points for account credits is a simple process that enhances the shopping experience. Users must be logged into their account and navigate to the "Loyalty Program" section, where they can view their total points and value in account credits. Points can only be redeemed in increments of 100, with each increment worth $1, and a minimum balance of 500 points is required for redemption. Once points are redeemed, credits will appear in the account within 24 hours and can be applied immediately at checkout, without any associated fees, though they are non-transferable and not redeemable for cash.

[Source: loyalty_program.md#redeeming-points]

sections.heading: Refund Timeline
sections.content:
Refunds that have been approved are typically processed within a timeframe of 5-7 business days. However, the specific time it takes for the refunded amount to appear in a customer's account may vary based on their bank or card provider.

[Source: refund_policy.md#refund-timeline]

sections.heading: Replacement Process
sections.content:
The replacement process for damaged items at Acme Shop begins after the damage report is approved. Within 1-2 business days, a replacement item will be dispatched to the provided shipping address, accompanied by an email confirmation and tracking details. To qualify for a replacement, the damage must be reported within 30 days of receipt, and the item should be returned in its original packaging, with Acme Shop covering return shipping costs. If the replacement item is unavailable, a full refund or store credit will be issued, excluding any promotional discounts used in the initial purchase.

[Source: damaged_items.md#replacement-process]

sections.heading: Reporting Damage
sections.content:
Acme Shop prioritizes customer satisfaction and provides a streamlined process for reporting damaged items. Customers must report damages within 14 days of receipt by logging into their account, selecting the relevant order, and filling out a damage report form with detailed descriptions and photos. Claims are reviewed within 48 hours, and approved claims can result in a replacement or refund, while items damaged due to misuse are not eligible. Exceptions may be made for late claims under special circumstances, which are handled on a case-by-case basis.

[Source: damaged_items.md#reporting-damage]

sections.heading: Requesting a Price Match
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, customers can request a price match if they find a lower price for an identical item from a qualifying retailer. To do so, they must contact customer service within 14 days of purchase and provide proof of the lower price. Eligibility includes that the competitor must be an authorized retailer with the product in stock, and price matching does not apply to auction sites or certain promotions. Once approved, refunds for the price difference are processed within 3–5 business days, with no additional fees for processing a price-match request.

[Source: price_matching.md#requesting-a-price-match]

sections.heading: Reset Password
sections.content:
Customers can easily reset their password directly from the sign-in page. It is important to note that the link provided for resetting the password has a validity period of 30 minutes before it expires.

[Source: account_help.md#reset-password]

sections.heading: Restocking Fee
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, a 15% restocking fee applies to returns of electronics, large appliances, and furniture to cover processing costs. Items must be returned in original condition within 30 days, including all accessories, to avoid deductions. The fee is waived if the return is due to Acme Shop's error, such as receiving a defective or incorrect product. Refund processing typically takes 7-10 business days after inspection of the returned item.

[Source: returns_policy.md#restocking-fee]

sections.heading: Return Window
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, customers have a 30-day return window from the date of delivery to return items for a refund or exchange, provided items are unused and in their original condition. Returns can be initiated through the Returns Center on the website, where customers will receive a prepaid shipping label. Some items, including perishable goods and those marked "final sale," are not eligible for returns, and return shipping fees may apply for oversized or international items. Refunds are processed within 7–10 business days after return inspection, and damaged or defective items can be reported for replacements within 48 hours of delivery.

[Source: returns_policy.md#return-window]

sections.heading: Self-Service Resources
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, our Self-Service Resources enhance customer support by providing immediate access to solutions through the Help Centre, FAQs, and a Virtual Assistant. The Help Centre contains a vast library of articles addressing topics like order tracking and returns, while the FAQs section offers quick answers to common inquiries about shipping, returns, and fees. For personalized help, the Virtual Assistant is available 24/7 and can connect users to live agents when necessary, ensuring efficient customer service and support.

[Source: customer_support.md#self-service-resources]

sections.heading: Setting Up a Subscription
sections.content:
To set up a subscription for a product with Acme Shop, log into your account and go to the product page, where you will find the "Subscribe & Save" or "Auto-Replenishment" option. After selecting your preferred replenishment frequency, confirm your shipping and payment details, with no additional fees for the subscription, though some products may offer discounts. You can modify or cancel your subscription at any time in the "My Subscriptions" section, and you will be notified if a product is out of stock, with your subscription resuming when available.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#setting-up-a-subscription]

sections.heading: Size Guide
sections.content:
Acme Shop provides detailed sizing charts across various product categories such as apparel, footwear, and accessories to assist customers in finding the right fit. Each category is equipped with tailored charts that include specific measurements, like chest, waist, and inseam for clothing, as well as foot length and width for footwear. Customers are encouraged to use a flexible tape measure to accurately determine their sizes, and if in doubt, to opt for a larger size for comfort. Acme Shop also offers free exchanges within 30 days for customers who may need a different size.

[Source: product_information.md#size-guide]

sections.heading: Stacking Rules
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, promotional codes are primarily restricted to one per order to ensure fair and efficient discounts. However, stacking is permitted in specific cases, such as combining a free shipping code with discounts for certain product categories, provided that eligibility criteria are met. It is essential to enter all promotional codes at checkout, as our system applies the best available discounts automatically. Any inquiries regarding promo codes should be directed to customer service within 14 days of purchase, as codes cannot be applied retroactively.

[Source: promo_codes.md#stacking-rules]

sections.heading: Standard Shipping
sections.content:
Standard shipping typically requires between 3 to 5 business days for delivery once the order has been dispatched from the warehouse.

[Source: shipping_faq.md#standard-shipping]

sections.heading: Stock Availability
sections.content:
To determine the stock status of a product at Acme Shop, visit the product page where you will find indicators such as "In Stock," "Low Stock," or "Out of Stock". If a product is labeled as "Low Stock," prompt action is advisable due to potential sellouts. For out-of-stock items, a restock alert feature is available; users can sign up for notifications by clicking the "Notify Me" button and providing contact information. It is important to note that signing up does not reserve the item, and restocking times may vary based on supply chain factors.

[Source: product_information.md#stock-availability]

sections.heading: Storage Guidelines
sections.content:
Proper storage is critical for the longevity of products from Acme Shop, particularly for items sensitive to environmental factors, such as electronics, cosmetics, and textiles. Electronics should be kept in a cool, dry place with a stable temperature between 50°F and 77°F (10°C and 25°C) and humidity below 60%. Cosmetics need to be shielded from heat and sunlight, while textiles benefit from breathable storage options to prevent mold and degradation. To ensure quality preservation, customers should refer to individual product care labels or manuals for specific instructions.

[Source: product_care.md#storage-guidelines]

sections.heading: Subscription Pricing Changes
sections.content:
Acme Shop values customer satisfaction by maintaining transparent pricing structures for subscription services. Customers will receive at least 30 days' notice via email for any upcoming price increases, allowing them time to decide on their subscriptions. New pricing takes effect in the following billing cycle after the change, while any decreases in price are applied automatically. The company also aims to mitigate impacts of external pricing factors and offers customer support for any inquiries related to subscription pricing changes.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#subscription-pricing-changes]

sections.heading: Supported Countries
sections.content:
Acme Shop provides international shipping to a wide range of countries, allowing customers worldwide to access their products. To confirm shipping eligibility, customers should refer to the "Shipping Destinations" section during checkout. Shipping fees, delivery times, and specific import restrictions vary by destination, and customers are responsible for any additional charges. The company also notes that international shipping may occasionally be suspended in certain areas due to logistical issues, and encourages customers to check the website or subscribe to updates.

[Source: international_shipping.md#supported-countries]

sections.heading: Suspicious Activity
sections.content:
Acme Shop prioritizes user security by monitoring for suspicious login activities on accounts. Upon detection of irregularities, such as logins from unfamiliar locations or devices, users receive immediate alerts via email and SMS. If the activity is unrecognized, users are advised to change their passwords promptly, and accounts may be temporarily locked during the verification process. Acme Shop encourages enabling [[two-factor-authentication]] (2FA) for enhanced security and offers 24/7 customer support for any related queries.

[Source: account_security.md#suspicious-activity]

sections.heading: Tracking Number
sections.content:
Customers are notified of their tracking number via email once the shipping label for their order has been generated in the warehouse. This tracking number enables them to monitor the status of their shipment during transit.

[Source: shipping_faq.md#tracking-number]

sections.heading: Two-Factor Authentication
sections.content:
Two-factor authentication (2FA) is a key security feature provided by Acme Shop to protect user accounts. To activate 2FA, users must have a compatible mobile device with a valid phone number linked to their account. After navigating to the "Account Security" section, users can choose between SMS or an authenticator app like Google Authenticator for their verification method. Once 2FA is set up, users will receive a code for every login attempt, greatly enhancing account security. While there are no fees for using 2FA, users should be mindful of maintaining access to their mobile devices and ensuring their verification methods work internationally, especially when traveling.

[Source: account_security.md#two-factor-authentication]

sections.heading: Volume Discounts
sections.content:
Acme Shop offers volume discounts for customers purchasing in bulk, with discounts structured based on quantity: 5% off for 50-99 units, 10% off for 100-199 units, and 15% off for over 200 units, applicable only to orders of the same SKU. These discounts are automatically applied at checkout but cannot be combined with other promotions or applied to sale items. Bulk orders may take 2-3 additional business days to process, and returns or cancellations will adjust the discount based on the revised order total, potentially affecting eligibility for the bulk discount.

[Source: bulk_orders.md#volume-discounts]

sections.heading: Warranty Claim
sections.content:
To file a warranty claim with Acme Shop, customers should first verify that their product is still under the one-year limited warranty, which covers manufacturing defects during normal use. Required documentation includes proof of purchase, the product serial number, and a detailed description of the issue, along with supporting photos or videos. The claim can then be submitted through the Acme Shop warranty claim page, and the customer service team will respond within 3-5 business days. If the claim is approved, a prepaid shipping label will be provided for returning the defective item, though customers are responsible for costs related to items outside the warranty or due to misuse.

[Source: warranty.md#warranty-claim]

sections.heading: Warranty Implications
sections.content:
At Acme Shop, warranties cover manufacturing defects and certain failures, but improper use or care of products can void this coverage. Customers must follow care instructions to maintain warranty eligibility, as noncompliance can lead to denied claims. Warranty claims require proof of proper maintenance and must be submitted within a specified period, typically one to two years; fees may apply for repairs on improperly cared for items. Accidental damage and wear and tear are typically not covered but may be eligible for discounted repair services.

[Source: product_care.md#warranty-implications]

sections.id: 不適用退款的情況#不適用退款的情況
sections.heading: 不適用退款的情況
sections.content:
退款政策中指出，以下情況下的商品不適用於退款：首先，數位內容如電子書或軟體序號，一旦下載後便不可退款。其次，客製化商品，如刻字或印花的產品，也不享有退款。如果食品或衛生用品已開封，則同樣無法退款。

[Source: 退款政策.md#不適用退款的情況]

sections.heading: 付款方式
sections.content:
本文件介紹了 ACME 商店所支援的各種[[付款方式]]，以及相關的政策和規定。

[Source: 付款方式.md#付款方式]

sections.heading: 保固期限
sections.content:
在 ACME 商店，商品的保固期限根據不同類別有所不同。電子與家電類商品的保固為 12 個月，配件與耗材類的保固則為 3 個月，而服飾與居家織品僅提供 7 天的鑑賞期，並不包含在保固範圍內。保固的起算日期為顧客簽收日，且顧客需保留電子發票或訂單編號作為保固憑證。

[Source: 商品保固.md#保固期限]

sections.id: 保固申請流程#保固申請流程
sections.heading: 保固申請流程
sections.content:
本頁面描述了商品的保固申請流程。使用者需登入官網，選擇故障商品並點擊「申請保固維修」，接著填寫故障情況並上傳相關照片或影片。客服將於3個工作天內進行審核並回覆寄修方式，維修作業通常需7至14個工作天。保固期內的非人為瑕疵維修不收費，僅需承擔寄回運費；逾保固期或屬人為損壞的情況下，將需報價並經客戶同意後再行維修。

[Source: 商品保固.md#保固申請流程]

sections.heading: 保固範圍
sections.content:
商品保固僅涵蓋在正常使用情況下發生的非人為瑕疵或功能故障。具體來說，不在保固範圍內的情形包括：人為損壞、摔落、進水或不當使用所造成的故障，自行拆解或改裝，及送非授權維修點維修。此外，自然耗損和外觀刮痕也不在保固範圍內。

[Source: 商品保固.md#保固範圍]

sections.id: 兩步驟驗證#兩步驟驗證
sections.heading: 兩步驟驗證
sections.content:
ACME 商店提供的兩步驟驗證（2FA）在登入時要求用戶提供第二道驗證，以增強帳號安全。用戶可在登入後的「帳號安全」設定中啟用此功能，選擇簡訊或驗證器 App（如 Authenticator）作為驗證方式。啟用後，陌生裝置登入時需輸入驗證碼，且此服務不收取任何費用；若用戶遺失驗證裝置無法登入，客服可在 24 小時內協助身份確認與恢復帳號存取權限。

[Source: 帳號安全.md#兩步驟驗證]

sections.heading: 分期付款
sections.content:
分期付款適用於單筆訂單金額滿新台幣3,000元的情況。消費者可以選擇3期分期，該選擇免手續費；而6期與12期的分期是否收取手續費則視各發卡銀行的規定而定。確認的分期結果由發卡銀行授權，ACME商店不會另外加收費用。

[Source: 付款方式.md#分期付款]

sections.heading: 商品保固
sections.content:
本檔案詳述了 ACME 商店針對各類商品的保固範圍及其申請流程，旨在提供顧客明確的保固資訊以利后續處理。

[Source: 商品保固.md#商品保固]

sections.id: 媒體與合作#媒體與合作
sections.heading: 媒體與合作
sections.content:
For media inquiries, advertising partnerships, or cross-industry alliances, interested parties should send an email to partner@acme-demo.example. It is important to specify the nature of the collaboration and the deadline in the email. Responses to partnership inquiries will be provided within **3 working days**.

[Source: 聯絡資訊.md#媒體與合作]

sections.heading: 客服中心
sections.content:
客服中心提供多種方式以解決一般訂單、退款或商品的諮詢需求。用戶可以透過客服信箱 service@acme-demo.example、免費專線0800-000-168或登錄官網使用線上即時客服來聯絡。客服專線和即時客服的服務時間為週一至週五上午9點至晚上6點，信件諮詢會在1個工作天內回覆，但在繁忙時期可能有所延遲。聯絡時建議提供訂單編號以加快處理。

[Source: 聯絡資訊.md#客服中心]

sections.id: 密碼與安全建議#密碼與安全建議
sections.heading: 密碼與安全建議
sections.content:
為了保障帳號安全，顧客應採取幾項安全建議，包括設定至少8個字元的密碼，並混合大小寫、數字和符號。此外，應避免在不同網站使用相同的密碼，並且定期檢視和移除不再使用的裝置。在公共電腦上，顧客不應勾選「記住我」選項。如懷疑帳號被盜用，應立即更改密碼並移除所有信任裝置，客服會提供協助。

[Source: 帳號安全.md#密碼與安全建議]

sections.heading: 帳號安全
sections.content:
該文件介紹了 ACME 商店所採用的帳號安全機制及其保護措施，旨在提高用戶的帳戶安全性。具體措施涵蓋了密碼管理、兩步驟驗證及其他防護策略，幫助用戶保護其帳號資訊。

[Source: 帳號安全.md#帳號安全]

sections.heading: 快速到貨
sections.content:
顧客如需快速收到商品，可在結帳時選擇快速到貨服務。一般在本島地區，快速到貨能在出貨後1至2個工作天內送達，運費為新台幣150元。下單與付款必須在每日午後2點前完成，部分大型或易碎商品不適用此服務，結帳頁面上會自動顯示可選的配送方式。

[Source: 運送與配送.md#快速到貨]

sections.id: 支援的付款方式#支援的付款方式
sections.heading: 支援的付款方式
sections.content:
ACME 商店提供多種付款方式以便利顧客。包括一次性付款的信用卡（如 VISA、MasterCard、JCB），分期付款（可選擇 3 期、6 期或 12 期），行動支付選項（Apple Pay、Google Pay），超商代碼繳費，以及貨到付款（僅限於超商取貨，且單筆上限為新台幣 20,000 元）。

[Source: 付款方式.md#支援的付款方式]

sections.heading: 會員等級
sections.content:
ACME 商店的會員制度依據消費金額分為三個等級：一般會員、銀卡會員及金卡會員。一般會員在註冊後即可獲得 1 倍的點數回饋；銀卡會員需於年度內消費達 **新台幣 15,000 元**，可享 1.5 倍點數回饋及生日禮券；金卡會員則需年度消費滿 **新台幣 50,000 元**，可享 2 倍點數回饋、免運優惠及優先客服。會員等級將根據每年的消費金額進行重新評定。

[Source: 會員與紅利點數.md#會員等級]

sections.id: 會員與紅利點數#會員與紅利點數
sections.heading: 會員與紅利點數
sections.content:
此頁面介紹了 ACME 商店的會員制度，以及紅利點數的累積和使用規則，說明了會員如何獲得和利用紅利點數的相關政策。

[Source: 會員與紅利點數.md#會員與紅利點數]

sections.heading: 標準配送
sections.content:
標準配送是ACME商店的預設運送方式，主要適用於台灣本島及離島。台灣本島的訂單通常在出貨後3至5個工作天內送達，而離島地區則需額外1至3個工作天。所有訂單在付款確認後24至48小時內出貨，促銷期間可能會延遲出貨時間。運費為新台幣80元，單筆訂單滿新台幣1,000元可享免運費優惠。

[Source: 運送與配送.md#標準配送]

sections.id: 異常登入偵測#異常登入偵測
sections.heading: 異常登入偵測
sections.content:
ACME 商店持續監控帳號異常登入行為，包括來自陌生地點或裝置的登入。一旦偵測到可疑活動，系統會立即通知帳號持有人，並提供登入的相關資訊。如果登入並非由本人操作，用戶應透過「忘記密碼」更新密碼，並可在需要時請求ACME 商店暫時鎖定帳號，通常在聯絡客服後可於24小時內解決身份確認問題。

[Source: 帳號安全.md#異常登入偵測]

sections.id: 發票與付款安全#發票與付款安全
sections.heading: 發票與付款安全
sections.content:
在付款方式的發票與付款安全部分，ACME 商店會為每位顧客開立電子發票，並在出貨後通過電子郵件發送。所有的線上刷卡交易都是透過加密通道進行，並且商店不會保存顧客的完整信用卡號。如果在交易過程中發生重複扣款，顧客應聯絡客服，退刷將在 5 至 7 個工作天內完成。

[Source: 付款方式.md#發票與付款安全]

sections.heading: 聯絡資訊
sections.content:
本頁面詳細說明了顧客如何聯絡ACME商店各個部門，以及不同部門的回覆時效。這些聯絡資訊旨在提高顧客的滿意度和方便性，使顧客能夠獲得所需的支援。

[Source: 聯絡資訊.md#聯絡資訊]

sections.id: 超商代碼繳費#超商代碼繳費
sections.heading: 超商代碼繳費
sections.content:
在超商代碼繳費中，顧客選擇此付款方式後，系統會生成一組繳費代碼。顧客須在 **3 天內** 到超商完成繳費，若逾期則該訂單將自動取消。此外，各單筆交易的繳費金額上限為 **新台幣 20,000 元**。

[Source: 付款方式.md#超商代碼繳費]

sections.heading: 超商取貨
sections.content:
ACME 商店提供超商取貨服務，運費為新台幣 60 元。當商品送達指定超商後，顧客會收到簡訊通知以進行取件，包裹的保留期限為 7 天，逾期未取的包裹將自動退回並取消訂單。此外，單件商品若重量超過 5 公斤或材積過大，則不適用此取貨方式。

[Source: 運送與配送.md#超商取貨]

sections.heading: 退款政策
sections.content:
退款政策詳細說明了顧客如何申請退款的規定與流程。文件中陳述了退款的條件以及所需的步驟，旨在幫助消費者清楚了解其權益和應遵循的程序。

[Source: 退款政策.md#退款政策]

sections.heading: 退款條件
sections.content:
退款政策的退款條件包括，商品必須未經使用並保持完整包裝，此外，退款申請需附上原始購買憑證，如發票或訂單編號。若因商品瑕疵或運送損壞而申請退款，則不受上述限制。

[Source: 退款政策.md#退款條件]

sections.heading: 退款流程
sections.content:
退款流程包括五個步驟：首先，使用者需登入帳號並前往「我的訂單」頁面；其次，選擇需退款的訂單並點擊「申請退款」。接著，使用者需要填寫退款原因並上傳相關照片（如商品瑕疵）。申請後，客服人員將在 **3 個工作天** 內審核申請。若審核通過，退款款項將在 **5–7 個工作天** 內退回原付款帳戶。

[Source: 退款政策.md#退款流程]

sections.id: 退款申請窗口#退款申請窗口
sections.heading: 退款申請窗口
sections.content:
顧客在收到商品後有 14 天的時間可以提出退款申請。逾期提出的退款申請將不予受理。

[Source: 退款政策.md#退款申請窗口]

sections.id: 退貨收件地址#退貨收件地址
sections.heading: 退貨收件地址
sections.content:
在寄回退換貨商品之前，必須先在官網上完成退款或退貨申請，並獲得退貨單號。隨後，將商品寄至指定的退貨收件地址：「ACME 商店物流中心，新北市虛構區範例路 100 號」。若未事先申請而直接寄回商品，將不予處理。

[Source: 聯絡資訊.md#退貨收件地址]

sections.id: 運送與配送#運送與配送
sections.heading: 運送與配送
sections.content:
本文件詳述了 ACME 商店的 [[配送方式]]、[[運費規則]] 以及 [[到貨時效]] 的相關信息，以便消費者了解其購物後的物流安排。

[Source: 運送與配送.md#運送與配送]

sections.heading: 配送查詢
sections.content:
顧客在訂單出貨後會收到一封包含物流單號的通知信，並可透過登入官網的「我的訂單」頁面選擇「查詢物流」來即時查看配送進度。物流資訊通常會在出貨後24小時內更新。

[Source: 運送與配送.md#配送查詢]

sections.heading: 點數使用
sections.content:
會員可於結帳時使用紅利點數來折抵消費金額，比例為每 1 點兌換新台幣 1 元，但每筆訂單最多只能折抵該筆金額的 50%。此外，紅利點數不能兌換現金或轉讓給其他帳號。若訂單需要退款，已使用或回饋的點數將會被收回。

[Source: 會員與紅利點數.md#點數使用]

sections.heading: 點數效期
sections.content:
紅利點數自入帳日起有效期為 **12 個月**，若在此期間未使用，將會自動失效。會員可以透過登入官網，在「我的點數」頁面查看目前的點數餘額及到期日。

[Source: 會員與紅利點數.md#點數效期]

sections.heading: 點數累積
sections.content:
ACME 會員可以通過消費來累積紅利點數，每消費新台幣 100 元即可獲得 1 點。計算的基礎是實際付款金額，不包括運費或已折抵的金額。會員需確保在下單時已登入帳號，紅利點數將在訂單完成後 24 小時內入帳。此外，會員還可以透過參加促銷活動或推薦好友來獲得額外點數，例如，每成功推薦一位好友完成首購可獲得 50 點獎勵。

[Source: 會員與紅利點數.md#點數累積]
